'''zhoshakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eparchic|eparchic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eparchic|eparchic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhoshakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshakithi|zhoshakithi]] || [[word:zhoshakiji|zhoshakiji]] || [[word:zhoshakishi|zhoshakishi]] || [[word:zhoshakiki|zhoshakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshakuthuthu|zhoshakuthuthu]] || [[word:zhoshakujuju|zhoshakujuju]] || [[word:zhoshakushushu|zhoshakushushu]] || [[word:zhoshakukuku|zhoshakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshakuthu|zhoshakuthu]] || [[word:zhoshakuju|zhoshakuju]] || [[word:zhoshakushu|zhoshakushu]] || [[word:zhoshakuku|zhoshakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshakufthuf|zhoshakufthuf]] || [[word:zhoshakufjuf|zhoshakufjuf]] || [[word:zhoshakufshuf|zhoshakufshuf]] || [[word:zhoshakufkuf|zhoshakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshakethe|zhoshakethe]] || [[word:zhoshakeje|zhoshakeje]] || [[word:zhoshakeshe|zhoshakeshe]] || [[word:zhoshakeke|zhoshakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshakothotho|zhoshakothotho]] || [[word:zhoshakojojo|zhoshakojojo]] || [[word:zhoshakoshosho|zhoshakoshosho]] || [[word:zhoshakokoko|zhoshakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshakotho|zhoshakotho]] || [[word:zhoshakojo|zhoshakojo]] || [[word:zhoshakosho|zhoshakosho]] || [[word:zhoshakoko|zhoshakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshakofthof|zhoshakofthof]] || [[word:zhoshakofjof|zhoshakofjof]] || [[word:zhoshakofshof|zhoshakofshof]] || [[word:zhoshakofkof|zhoshakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŠthĂŠ|zhoshakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŠjĂŠ|zhoshakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŠshĂŠ|zhoshakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshakĂŠkĂŠ|zhoshakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshakathatha|zhoshakathatha]] || [[word:zhoshakajaja|zhoshakajaja]] || [[word:zhoshakashasha|zhoshakashasha]] || [[word:zhoshakakaka|zhoshakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshakatha|zhoshakatha]] || [[word:zhoshakaja|zhoshakaja]] || [[word:zhoshakasha|zhoshakasha]] || [[word:zhoshakaka|zhoshakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshakafthaf|zhoshakafthaf]] || [[word:zhoshakafjaf|zhoshakafjaf]] || [[word:zhoshakafshaf|zhoshakafshaf]] || [[word:zhoshakafkaf|zhoshakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhoshakasha|zhoshakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshakshĂ«sha|zhoshakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshakrosha|zhoshakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshakmusha|zhoshakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshakyasha|zhoshakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshaknkshĂ«sha|gozhoshaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshaknkrosha|gozhoshaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshaknkmusha|gozhoshaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshaknkyasha|gozhoshaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhoshashakasha|zhoshashakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshashakshĂ«sha|zhoshashakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshashakrosha|zhoshashakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshashakmusha|zhoshashakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshashakyasha|zhoshashakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshashaknkshĂ«sha|gozhoshashaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshashaknkrosha|gozhoshashaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshashaknkmusha|gozhoshashaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshashaknkyasha|gozhoshashaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zheshĂŠkasha|zheshĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zheshĂŠkshĂ«sha|zheshĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zheshĂŠkrosha|zheshĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zheshĂŠkmusha|zheshĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zheshĂŠkyasha|zheshĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠknkshĂ«sha|gozheshĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠknkrosha|gozheshĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠknkmusha|gozheshĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠknkyasha|gozheshĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhoshfakasha|zhoshfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshfakshĂ«sha|zhoshfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshfakrosha|zhoshfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshfakmusha|zhoshfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshfakyasha|zhoshfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshfaknkshĂ«sha|gozhoshfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshfaknkrosha|gozhoshfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshfaknkmusha|gozhoshfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshfaknkyasha|gozhoshfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
